title: The Black Chapel
overview: 1933 in Germany. The rise of Nazism fears war and some officers, concerned the fate that hostilities would reserve to their country, organize an anti-Nazi group. They send a reporter, Golder, to communicate the plan of the German offensive allies.

trailers.title: Pidax - Geheimaktion Schwarze Kapelle (1959, Ralph Habib)
